revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿五]][[zh:四月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 25|qq=April 25}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 25''' is the 25th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tenji Tennō|1=Emperor Tenji}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|671|en|671|qid=Q30722|lt=671|1=671}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}) – The time signal was initiated using a water clock ({{ill|Water clock|en|Water clock|qid=Q194173|lt=water clock|1=Water clock}}) and bells and drums ({{ill|Time Commemoration Day|ja|時の記念日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Time Commemoration Day|1=Toki no Kinenbi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11089235}}). * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|735|en|735|qid=Q23576|lt=735|1=735}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}) – {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang Dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}} emissary {{ill|Kibi no Makibi|en|Kibi no Makibi|qid=Q1063276|lt=Kibi no Makibi|1=Kibi no Makibi}}, having traveled to Tang, returned to court and presented the books and documents he brought back to {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}. * {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|qid=Q1327993|lt=Kenji|1=Kenji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|qid=Q5529|lt=1275|1=1275}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} to {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|qid=Q1327993|lt=Kenji|1=Kenji (era)}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Shōan|en|Shōan|qid=Q1327427|lt=Shōan|1=Shōan}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1299|en|1299|qid=Q5564|lt=1299|1=1299}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}}) – With the accession of {{ill|Emperor Go-Fushimi|en|Emperor Go-Fushimi|qid=Q440454|lt=Later Fushimi Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Fushimi}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Einin|ja|永祚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin|1=Einin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11132532}} to {{ill|Shōan|en|Shōan|qid=Q1327427|lt=Shōan|1=Shōan}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}}) – Due to a great fire in Kyoto in January, the era name was changed from {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} to {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}}. * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku|1=正德}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – With the accession of {{ill|Emperor Nakamikado|en|Emperor Nakamikado|qid=Q314817|lt=Chūgimon Tennō|1=Emperor Nakamikado}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} to {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku|1=正德}}. == Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1663|en|1663|qid=Q7577|lt=1663|1=1663}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienobu|en|Tokugawa Ienobu|qid=Q366734|lt=Tokugawa Ienobu|1=Tokugawa Ienobu}}, the 6th-generation {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (died {{ill|1712|en|1712|qid=Q6871|lt=1712|1=1712}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|qid=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – {{ill|Kawaji Seimō|ja|川路聖謨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaji Seimō|1=Kawaji Toshiakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3532613}}, a {{ill|Hatamoto|en|Hatamoto|qid=Q572662|lt=Hatamoto|1=Hatamoto}} (died {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yankang|en|Yankang|qid=Q11065039|lt=Yenkō (Han)|1=Yankang}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|220|en|220|qid=Q30866|lt=220|1=220}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|qid=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Xiahou Dun|en|Xiahou Dun|qid=Q378433|lt=Xiahou Dun|1=Xiahou Dun}}, a military commander of the {{ill|Three Kingdoms period|ja|三国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Kingdoms period|1=Three Kingdoms period|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11354714}} in {{ill|Cao Wei|ja|魏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cao Wei|1=Cao Wei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124257886}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Emperor Kenzō|en|Emperor Kenzō|qid=Q360966|lt=Emperor Kenzō|1=Emperor Kenzō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|487|en|487|qid=Q31588|lt=487|1=487}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kenzō|en|Emperor Kenzō|qid=Q360966|lt=Emperor Kenzō|1=Emperor Kenzō}}, the 23rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|450|en|450|qid=Q31761|lt=450|1=450}}). * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 2nd year (leap April) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1493|en|1493|qid=Q6687|lt=1493|1=1493}} {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|qid=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}}) – {{ill|Hatakeyama Masanaga|en|Hatakeyama Masanaga|qid=Q5680891|lt=Hatakeyama Masanaga|1=Hatakeyama Masanaga}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and {{ill|Kanrei|en|Kanrei|qid=Q1202497|lt=Kanrō|1=Kanrei}} (born {{ill|1442|en|1442|qid=Q6411|lt=1442|1=1442}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|qid=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Ōkubo Nagayasu|en|Ōkubo Nagayasu|qid=Q133746|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}, who developed gold mine administration including the {{ill|Sado mine|en|Sado mine|qid=Q11248197|lt=Sado Kinzan|1=Sado mine}} (born {{ill|1545|en|1545|qid=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year/{{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}}) – {{ill|Kondō Isami|en|Kondō Isami|qid=Q467334|lt=Kondō Isami|1=Kondō Isami}}, the head of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|qid=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} (born {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|24|4|26|3|25|5|4|0425|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:4 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 25 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 25일]] [[ja:4月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月廿五]]
[[ar:April 25 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿五]]
